final.prompt:
Use case: cinematic support footage for a narrated commercial real estate strategy video
Primary request: a commercial real estate underwriting desk late at night with loan documents, a rent roll, a marked-up site plan, and a calculator under disciplined task lighting
Scene/background: high-rise office after hours, distant city lights beyond the glass, quiet tension
Subject: annotated underwriting papers, lender checklist, site plan, calculator, empty chair
Action: paper corners lift subtly in the conditioned air while city lights shimmer softly in the background
Camera: slow dolly-in, 35mm, steady and controlled
Lighting/mood: low-key tungsten practicals, serious, disciplined, restrained
Color palette: charcoal, muted teal, soft coral, steel blue, warm amber
Style/format: filmic, natural grain, premium commercial real estate mood
Timing/beats: single slow push over eight seconds
Constraints: no logos, no text, no people, no readable numbers, realistic office geometry
Avoid: jitter; flicker; warped paper; surreal motion; readable text
